title: rubia olivieri var. cretica
intro: Rubia olivieri var. cretica, also known as Cretan madder or Cretan rubia, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthraquinones, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Rubia olivieri var. cretica include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
